title: The Idun CMS
excerpt: A CMS that does what you need, without the baggage.
meta_title: The Idun CMS — Fast, modular, honest
meta_description: A modern CMS built with FastAPI and Svelte. Modular, fast, multi-language, with built-in shop, courses, email, and analytics.

settings.title: Meet Idun.
settings.subtitle: A CMS built by someone who got tired of all the others.

settings.content:
What makes Idun different?

Most CMS platforms start simple and get complicated. Idun stays simple — because complexity is a choice, not a requirement.

🏛️ Modular by design

Every feature is a module you can toggle on or off. Need a shop? Flip a switch. Online courses? Toggle it on. Don’t need payments? Leave it off. Your site only runs what it uses.

⚡ Actually fast

Idun runs on FastAPI (Python) and Svelte 5 (JavaScript). That means server-side rendering, instant page loads, and a backend that handles thousands of requests without breaking a sweat. No PHP. No Node.js spaghetti.

🌍 Multi-language from day one

Every page can be translated. DeepL integration handles auto-translation. Heimdall (our translation module) manages versions per language. Built for Europe, works everywhere.

🎨 Theming that actually works

Pick a starter theme, adjust colors with OKLCH sliders, tweak spacing and radius — all from the admin panel. No CSS files to edit, no child themes to maintain. Your brand, your way.

🔒 Security and privacy built in

RBAC (role-based access control), GDPR compliance tools, audit logs, privacy-respecting analytics via Umami. No cookie consent banners needed.

🤖 AI that helps, not replaces

Hugin, our AI assistant, lives in the admin panel. It helps you write content, suggests improvements, and answers questions about your site. It’s a tool, not a gimmick.

settings.heading: The Tech Stack
settings.description: For the curious and the technical.

cards.title: FastAPI
cards.subtitle: Python backend. Async, typed, documented. Each module is its own microservice.

cards.title: Svelte 5
cards.subtitle: Modern frontend with runes. Server-side rendered. Tiny bundles. Instant interactions.

cards.title: PostgreSQL
cards.subtitle: Rock-solid database. Your data is yours. Export it anytime, no proprietary formats.

cards.title: Docker
cards.subtitle: One command to deploy. Blue-green zero-downtime deploys included.

cards.title: Umami
cards.subtitle: Privacy-first analytics. No cookies, no consent banners, full GDPR compliance.

cards.title: Stripe
cards.subtitle: Payments that work. Products, subscriptions, invoices. Toggle it on when you need it.

settings.title: Want Idun for your project?
settings.description: We’re onboarding early adopters now. Be one of the first to run your site on something genuinely better.
